children.name: p
children.textContent: Your private playbook of what works.

children.name: p
children.textContent: " The lavender + lofi combo actually worked. "

children.name: p
children.textContent: " Brown noise helped a lot. Desk clear was key. "

children.name: p
children.textContent: " Phone away rule made a real difference. "

children.name: p
children.textContent: " Tea helped. Could use a longer rest next time. "
